subcodes.first_line: I know not, O my God, which of my afflictions I shall bewail before Thee, nor how I should pour forth my grief and tribulation. Behold, O my Beloved One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لم ادر یا الهی ان اشکو الیک ای بلائی و ابث ای حزنی و ابتلائی ارایت یا محبوبی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @suffering and imprisonment, @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for martyrs
